items.statcast_observation: Jac Caglianone produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 113.6 mph at a 6.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals lost to the Texas Rangers, KC 6, TEX 7. Seth Lugo led the night, working 6.0 innings with 1 earned runs, 6 strikeouts and 0 walks. Jac Caglianone supplied the loudest Royals contact at 113.6 mph.
items.title: Royals at Rangers Recap
